title: We Have Heard

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Our fathers spoke of ancient days
When Your hand drove the nations away
Planted our people in this land
Not by their sword, but by Your command

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are You now in our despair?
Have You forgotten what we bear?
Rise up, awake, don't hide Your face
Redeem us by Your endless grace

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Not in my bow do I find peace
Not by my blade do wars yet cease
You alone brought us victory
Through darkest night, You made us free

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Now we're scattered like sheep for prey
Sold for nothing, cast far away
Mocked by neighbors, scorned by all
Yet still we rise when You do call

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Though we've kept Your covenant true
Our hearts have never turned from You
In death's dark valley, we remain
Your faithful ones who praise Your name

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are You now in our despair?
Have You forgotten what we bear?
Rise up, awake, don't hide Your face
Redeem us by Your endless grace
For Your sake, we face death each day
Like lambs, we walk the martyr's way
Yet still we trust Your steadfast love
Arise and send help from above

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are You now in our despair?
Have You forgotten what we bear?
Rise up, awake, don't hide Your face
Redeem us by Your endless grace

epigraph: what work thou didst in their days
